hero.title: About Us
hero.description: TryUtils is committed to providing users with simple and practical online tools

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Make complex file processing simple and easy to use, without installing complex software, complete various format conversions and processing tasks directly in browser.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: TryUtils was born from the need for simple and efficient tools. In daily work, we often encounter various file format conversion needs, but existing solutions either require installing complex software or have privacy security issues.
story.paragraph2: Therefore, we decided to create a completely browser-based tool collection that allows users to safely and quickly process various file formats while protecting user privacy and data security.

vision.title: Future Vision
vision.description: We will continue to expand our tool collection, covering more file formats and processing needs, always adhering to the principles of simplicity, ease of use, and privacy security, becoming the most trusted online tool platform for users.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any suggestions or cooperation intentions, please feel free to contact us via email.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: We value your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: TryUtils (hereinafter referred to as "we") is committed to protecting user privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect your personal information.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.point1: Usage data: including pages you visit, features you use, access time, etc.
collection.point2: Device information: browser type, operating system, IP address and other technical information
collection.point3: File processing: Files you upload are only processed locally in browser, not uploaded to our servers

usage.title: Information Usage
usage.point2: Analyze website usage to optimize user experience
usage.point3: Ensure website security and prevent abuse

cookies.title: Cookie Usage
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve user experience, including remembering your language preferences and analyzing website usage. You can control cookie usage through browser settings.

thirdParty.title: Third-party Services
thirdParty.description: We may use third-party analytics services (such as Google Analytics) to understand website usage. These services have their own privacy policies.

security.title: Data Security
security.description: We take reasonable technical and administrative measures to protect your information security. All file processing is completed locally in your browser and not transmitted to our servers.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.point1: Access: You can request to know what information we collect about you
rights.point2: Correction: You can request correction of inaccurate information
rights.point3: Deletion: You can request deletion of your personal information

updates.title: Policy Updates
updates.description: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Major changes will be announced on the website and the "last updated" date will be updated.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us via email.

meta.title: Privacy Policy - TryUtils
meta.description: Learn how TryUtils collects, uses and protects your personal information. We are committed to protecting your privacy, all file processing is completed locally.

q1.question: What image formats are supported?
q1.answer: We support conversion between JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, AVIF and TIFF formats. You can convert from any supported format to any other supported format.

q2.question: Is there a file size limit?
q2.answer: The maximum file size is 100MB. For optimal performance, we recommend using files under 50MB.

q3.question: Are my files secure?
q3.answer: Yes, all files are processed locally in your browser. No files are uploaded to our servers, ensuring complete privacy and security.

q4.question: What are the differences between formats?
q4.answer: JPEG is best for photos, PNG is suitable for images with transparency, WebP is optimized for web, GIF is suitable for animations, AVIF is a next-generation compression format, and TIFF is suitable for professional use.
